title: Lab 32: SSH Key Authentication
description: Configure passwordless SSH login from clientvm to servervm using a key pair.

tasks.title: Create user relay32 on clientvm and user vault32 on
tasks.prompt: Create user relay32 on clientvm and user vault32 on servervm. Set the password of both users to cinder9.

tasks.title: Configure key-based SSH authentication so that user
tasks.prompt: Configure key-based SSH authentication so that user relay32 on clientvm can log in to vault32@servervm without a password prompt.

tasks.title: Do not disable PasswordAuthentication globally for
tasks.prompt: Do not disable PasswordAuthentication globally for this task.

hints: Generate the key as the source user.
Populate authorized_keys for the target user.

checks.original_command: runuser -l relay32 -c 'ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes vault32@servervm true'
checks.command: runuser -l relay32 -c 'ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes vault32@servervm true'
